title: Support modules which are never used with their default parameter values

features.name: parameter with empty string default
features.description: Code should include a module parameter declared with an empty string as its default value

features.name: localparam computed from parameter division
features.description: Code should include a localparam that is computed by dividing two parameters

features.name: generate for loop with localparam bound
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop that uses a localparam as its bound

features.name: module instantiation overriding string parameter with integer
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where integer values are passed to parameters that have empty string defaults
